failure_summary: The agent treated the available 2011-12 fields as proxies for the requested 2012/2013 readiness and graduation constraints, which led it to the wrong DBN and the wrong school branch.
failure_evidence: Turn 22 | the filtered candidate set produced only ["10X549", "54.10%", "A"] for the assumed readiness/graduation columns; Turn 27 | the downstream school-name lookup for DBN 10X549 returned Discovery High School, confirming the agent had committed to the wrong school branch instead of the intended Stuyvesant path.

failure_evidence:
